meta.name: Recover abandoned event registrations with Gemini and email plus Slack alerts

name: Abandoned Cart Recovery for Event Registration TEMPLATE

parameters.content:
## Abandoned Cart Monitor

### **What it does:**
Detects incomplete registrations and sends a 3-stage recovery email sequence (1h nudge → 24h social proof → 72h last chance) to recover abandoned carts.

### **Why it matters:**
Fight for every abandoned cart like there is no tomorrow. 6-7 page forms see 80-90% drop-off. Even with our minimal 4-field form, some registrants will abandon — this recovers them.

### **How it works:**
1. Runs every 4 hours via schedule trigger
2. Queries registrations with `status = started` (beacon fired, no submit)
3. Calculates time since start to determine recovery stage
4. Sends stage-appropriate email with increasing urgency
5. Logs recovery attempts to prevent duplicate sends

### **Setup steps:**
1. Update `PLACEHOLDER_REGISTRATIONS_TABLE_ID`
2. Update `PLACEHOLDER_CART_RECOVERY_TABLE_ID`
3. Update `PLACEHOLDER_REG_URL` in email templates
4. Configure email credentials
5. Activate the workflow

## Email Recovery Sequence

**1h — Nudge:** Friendly reminder, takes 30 seconds to finish
**24h — Social Proof:** "47 more professionals registered since you left"
**72h — Last Chance:** Price increase urgency, scarcity messaging

Per Julius: "No urgency, no sale" + "Remarketing is essential"

Each email links directly back to the reg form with the session pre-loaded.

## Was this helpful? Get in touch!

[![clic](https://vptkuqoipqbebipqjnqw.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/Milo%20Bravo/seeAxWUupcOOXY5tntexZ_video.gif)](https://tally.so/r/EkKGgB)

I really hope this automation helped you. Your feedback is incredibly valuable and helps me create better resources for business and the n8n community.

I've streamlined the way we connect. It all starts with one simple form that takes less than 10 seconds. After that, you'll chat with my AI assistant who will gather the key details and pass them directly on to me.
